title: An Act to Provide for the Direct Shipment of Spirits to Consumers

actions.description: Committee on Veterans and Legal Affairs suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on VETERANS AND LEGAL AFFAIRS in concurrence

Reports READ . Motion of Representative SUPICA of Bangor, to ACCEPT the Minority Ought Not to Pass Report FAILED . ROLL CALL NO. 279 (Yeas 67 - Nays 70 - Absent 14 - Excused 0) Subsequently, on motion of Representative SUPICA of Bangor, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-385) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-385) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports Read On motion by Senator HICKMAN of Kennebec the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report ACCEPTED PREVAILED Roll Call Ordered Roll Call Number 339 Yeas 18 - Nays 14 - Excused 3 - Absent 0 Bill READ ONCE Committee Amendment "A" (H-385) READ and ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-385) in concurrence

Representative JAVNER of Chester REQUESTED a Roll Call. More than one-fifth of the members present expressed a desire for a roll call, which was ORDERED . On motion of Representative MOONEN of Portland, TABLED pending PASSAGE TO BE ENACTED . Later today assigned. (Roll Call Ordered)
Speaker laid before the House Subsequently, the Bill FAILED PASSAGE TO BE ENACTED . ROLL CALL NO. 382 (Yeas 71 - Nays 75 - Absent 3 - Excused 2) Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in NON-CONCURRENCE . Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence.
